name: jikji-english-semantic
note: English semantic set — query meaning ≈ memory with low surface overlap (paraphrase/synonym/hypernym). Same difficulty design as the Korean semantic set, to check the 'English first-class' claim.

setup.text: Coffee is my essential way to start the day
I rarely drink tea, only on cold evenings

query.need: beverage I usually have in the morning

setup.text: I concentrate far better when working from home
The office is too noisy for deep work
I live with my companion feline named Nabi
My neighbor keeps a golden retriever

query.need: do I have a pet cat

I sometimes take a slow walk in the park
I avoid meat and eat mostly vegetables and tofu
I love a good medium-rare steak
I open my eyes at 5am to begin the day
I usually stay up past midnight

I never really got into podcasts

I take the subway when it rains
I decorated a cozy newlywed home with my wife
My roommate moved out last year
Eating anything with peanuts gives me hives
I am slightly lactose intolerant

I dabble a little in Rust on weekends
